data.body: DONE: docs/config.md written (format/precedence/discovery/typed-config/settings-vs-secrets/loud/constraints/full key inventory/back-compat/transparency). tomllib confirmed on the 3.11 runtime floor (import tomllib OK; requires-python>=3.11; py310 is ruff-lint-only) -> no fallback/core dep. Subagent-reviewed: solid; fixed the one finding (llm.repo_path documented as runtime-only). Unblocks the typed-Config task.
